summary: The diff modifies AboutSection.tsx to use an uploaded portrait image, but uses the wrong asset path. The requirement specifies the image must be saved and served from 'frontend/public/assets/generated/debraj-profile.jpg', but the implementation uses '/assets/my portfolio image-1.jpg' as the src. Additionally, there is no evidence in the diff that the image file was actually saved to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/debraj-profile.jpg'.

missing_requirements.requirement: The image must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/debraj-profile.jpg and the src must point to the generated asset path.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows the src is set to '/assets/my portfolio image-1.jpg' instead of the required '/assets/generated/debraj-profile.jpg'. The generated asset file (debraj-profile.jpg) also does not appear in the added files list.
